ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead user responsible for the project */,
  "version_control_system" TEXT /* Version control system used */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "package_description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package the type belongs to */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "type_kind" TEXT /* Kind of the type (class or interface) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the type was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type the metric belongs to */,
  "nof" INTEGER /* Number of files */,
  "nopf" INTEGER /* Number of package files */,
  "nom" INTEGER /* Number of methods */,
  "nopm" INTEGER /* Number of package methods */,
  "loc" INTEGER /* Lines of code */,
  "wmc" INTEGER /* Weighted methods per class */,
  "nc" INTEGER /* Number of children */,
  "dit" INTEGER /* Depth of inheritance tree */,
  "lcom" REAL /* Lack of cohesion in methods */,
  "fanin" INTEGER /* Fan-in (number of types that depend on this type) */,
  "fanout" INTEGER /* Fan-out (number of types this type depends on) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last modified */,
  "recorded_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who recorded the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_recorded_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("recorded_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the issue belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type the issue is related to */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., bug, enhancement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue */,
  "assigned_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for resolving the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to the issue */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was assigned */,
  "assigned_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the issue */,
  "resolved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who resolved the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_assigned_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_resolved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment resolved the issue */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
